race.comment: BILL PEYTO (10) settled well back last time out then found the line strongly to finish fifth over 2100m at Tamworth. Will drift back but is sure to be strong home and looks one set to prove tough to beat. OAKFIELD ECHIDNA (12) finished out of the money two starts back then ran fifth over 1800m at Gulgong two weeks ago. Going up a level this time but he is good enough to play a major role. MARIOTA (2) was safely held when ninth over 1400m at Moree. Assess on the win at Mudgee at the previous outing. In contention this time if recapturing that sort of form. TOP ACT (7) can be the best of the rest.
